data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this pricing structure. While the use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there is no evidence of actual pricing data or API responses that demonstrate this pricing is implemented. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the requirement of location-specific pricing.
gaps: No evidence of API responses or persisted state checks confirming location-specific pricing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
